title: God
questions: Why do different religions have different gods?
What do you think God thinks of the way we live?
Is God the creator and ruler of the whole universe?
Why are there so many people who do not believe in God?
Why is God always seen as a white man in paintings and drawings?
Is there a difference in how Christians, Muslims and Jews see God?
Why do people who believe in God fight in wars?
I believe in God, only I spell it 'Nature'. What do you think of this quote by Frank Lloyd Wright?
If Christians, Muslims and Jews all believe in the same God, why is there so much fighting among them?
Is there any proof that God exists?
No God, no peace. Know God, know peace. What do you think of this quote?
Why did God create a huge universe when all that is important is here on Earth?
Why does God let innocent people suffer and evil people prosper?
Does God love everyone the same?
Why doesn't God answer everyone's prayers?
What question would you like to ask God?
If a person believes that God can protect them from natural disasters, do you think they also believe that God caused those disasters in the first place?
